name: Create channel option is available only for Siteadmin -- @1.2
fullName: Create, Update, Delete Channel And Add, Delete Topics and Groups from Channel: Create channel option is available only for Siteadmin

steps.name: Given user logs in as "cucuser1@kpoint.com" with password "admin_password"
When user navigates to Create section
Then user is "unable" to create channel is verified

labels.name: feature
labels.value: Create, Update, Delete Channel And Add, Delete Topics and Groups from Channel
